channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Beyond Venezuela and Cuba: The U.S. Military’s Future Operations in the Western Hemisphere
item.description: CSIS Americas Program Senior Associate Wilder Alejandro Sánchez analyzes areas for future U.S. security operations in the Western Hemisphere.

item.title: Unleashing Market Forces for Spectrum Use in Space
item.description: Updates to FCC rules limiting transmit power for low Earth orbit satellite networks are a positive step towards optimizing the efficiency and productivity of spectrum—but there is a long way to go to fully unleash market forces for spectrum use in space.
